titles.name: -- III --
titles.disc: Receive a title dedicated to 3 Year Anniversary of War Thunder. Just login to the game between the 30th of October and the 2nd of November.

titles.name: Brother in Arms
titles.disc: All War Thunder players will find a new title in their profile.

titles.name: Cavalier of the Distinguished Service Cross
Cavalier of the Cross of Merit of War
Cavalier of the German Cross in Gold
Cavalier of the Distinguished Service Order
Cavalier of the Order of the Patriotic War
Cavalier of the Order of the Rising Sun
Combat Proven
titles.disc: All War Thunder players will find a new title in their profile.

titles.name: Deck the Halls
titles.disc: For 12 completed ""Christmas lights"" tasks for pilots or for 12 completed ""Christmas lights"" for tankers you will get the unique title.

titles.name: Master of Disguise
titles.disc: Unlock the indicated quantity of camouflages

titles.name: Faithful Warrior
titles.disc: All War Thunder players will find a new title in their profile.

titles.name: ▂ Falcon ▂
titles.disc: If you already own the 5th rank of USSR aircraft or ground vehicles, you will receive a unique title dedicated to 3 Year Anniversary of War Thunder!

titles.name: Fine Art Expert
titles.disc: Unlock the indicated quantity of decals

titles.name: Jet-Powered
titles.disc: Obtain an aircraft of maximum rank.

titles.name: ▄ Knight ▄
titles.disc: If you already own the 5th rank of British aircraft, you will receive a unique title dedicated to 3 Year Anniversary of War Thunder!

titles.name: Let’s go!
titles.disc: Another milestone in the history of War Thunder has been reached - 121,784 players that were online at the same time! May these memorable title stop you forgetting about that achievement.

titles.name: Santa's Little Helper
titles.disc: Can be received during the New Year holiday special

titles.name: The Old Guard
titles.disc: All War Thunder players will find a new title in their profile.

titles.name: War Thunder Mastermind
titles.disc: Title is awarded for participation in the FB quiz.
